SSS2 Physics — Mechanics | Term 1 Scheme of Work
Curriculum Board: NERDC | Duration: 13 Weeks

| Week | Topic | Objectives | Activities | Assessment |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Week 1 | Scalars and Vectors | Distinguish scalars from vectors | Card sorting activity | Class quiz |
| Week 2 | Linear Motion | Analyse motion graphs | Graph plotting | Short test |
| Week 3 | Velocity-time graphs | Compare uniform vs non-uniform motion | Data collection | Worksheet |
| Week 4 | Newton's First Law | Analyse inertia using demonstrations | Block demonstration | Oral Q&A |
| Week 5 | Newton's Second Law | Calculate force using F=ma | Trolley experiment | Lab report |
| Week 6 | Newton's Third Law | Examine action-reaction pairs | Balloon demonstration | Written exercise |
| Week 7 | Projectile Motion (H) | Analyse horizontal and vertical components | Ball throw experiment | Practical |
| Week 8 | Projectile Motion (O) | Compare ranges at different angles | Scale drawings | Quiz |
| Week 9 | Work and Energy | Distinguish work, energy, power | Problem calculations | Problem set |
| Week 10 | Conservation of Energy | Analyse energy transformations | Pendulum experiment | Worksheet |
| Week 11 | Simple Machines | Examine mechanical advantage | Station rotation | Lab report |
| Week 12 | Revision | Analyse past WAEC questions | Peer teaching | Mock test |
| Week 13 | Assessment | Examine all topics | Written exam | Term exam |
